ASR Outdoor 3pc Metal Detecting Plastic Scoop Magnet Glass Vial Gold Panning Kit

A must-have combo for any gold prospector or treasure hunter, this 3-piece kit is perfect for gold panning, metal detecting, and cleanup work!

Kit Includes:

Key Features

  • COMPLETE 3PC PROSPECTING KIT - Includes a prospector’s scoop, magnetic separator with quick release, and a glass storage vial for convenient gold recovery and storage.
  • POWERFUL MAGNETIC SEPARATOR - 16-lb capacity magnet quickly removes black sand and iron from your pan, making gold cleanup faster and more efficient.
  • NON-METALLIC HEAVY DUTY SCOOP - Durable plastic scoop won’t bend or break and won’t interfere with metal detectors, perfect for digging through sand, soil, or gravel.
  • SECURE GLASS VIAL FOR STORAGE - Safely store gold flakes, small finds, or samples in a glass vial with a screw-on plastic cap for field or home use.
  • IDEAL FOR GOLD PANNING & METAL DETECTING - Lightweight, compact, and easy to carry—perfect for beginners and seasoned prospectors alike.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 3PCGPKHPN

(1) Heavy-Duty Plastic Prospector's Scoop

(1) 16-lb Magnetic Separator Pick-Up Tool with Quick Release

(1) Glass Storage Vial with Screw-On Cap

Tackle the final stages of your gold cleanup with ease using the powerful magnetic separator. Designed to lift up to 16 lbs, this tool quickly removes black sand (iron) from your pan, leaving you with cleaner, more visible gold. Also useful for picking up nails, screws, and other ferrous metals in small projects.

The non-metallic scoop is lightweight yet tough - perfect for digging through sand, soil, or gravel. Since it contains no metal, it won’t interfere with your metal detector, making it ideal for fieldwork.

Safely store your gold flakes or small finds in the included glass vial with a secure, screw-on plastic cap.

Whether you're just starting out or upgrading your gear, this compact, durable kit is a great addition to any prospector’s toolkit.
